mapper.select: select userSeq, userRoleCode, userId, userPassword, userEmail, userName, userBirth, userGender, userPhone, userAddr1, userAddr2, createdAt, updatedAt from user where userId = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into user( userId, userPassword, userName, userBirth, userGender, userPhone, userAddr1, userAddr2, userRoleCode, userEmail, createdAt, updatedAt ) values ( #{userId}, #{userPassword}, #{userName}, #{userBirth}, #{userGender}, #{userPhone}, #{userAddr1}, #{userAddr2}, #{userRoleCode}, #{userEmail}, Now(), Now() )
